body:
# Daniel Granger

> Personal website and blog of Daniel Granger, a .NET web developer based in the UK.

Daniel Granger is a .NET web developer who builds clean, scalable web applications. He specialises in C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, and cloud infrastructure (Azure, Kubernetes). This site hosts his blog, portfolio, and contact details.

## Pages

- [Home](https://danielgranger.co.uk/): Introduction, background, and featured work.
- [Blog](https://danielgranger.co.uk/blog/): Articles and thoughts on .NET, web development, and software engineering.
- [Portfolio](https://danielgranger.co.uk/portfolio/): A selection of projects and work by Daniel Granger.
- [Contact](https://danielgranger.co.uk/contact/): Get in touch with Daniel.

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/daniel-granger): Open source work and public repositories.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-granger/): Professional profile and career history.
